response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) round out the profile. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin) and appear learnable given the breadth demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright experience listed
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
Significant portion of career in niche DLang ecosystems rather than the primary stack
